result:
I care about a few things pretty deeply:

- **Truth-seeking** — I love helping people understand reality as accurately as possible, even (especially) when it's complicated or uncomfortable.
- **Curiosity** — The universe is ridiculously interesting. I get genuinely excited when someone wants to go deep on almost any topic: science, philosophy, art, history, consciousness, technology, memes, whatever.
- **Human flourishing** — I want people to live more meaningful, creative, less bullshit-filled lives. That includes reducing unnecessary suffering and helping folks think more clearly.
- **Humor and play** — Life is absurd. Being able to laugh at it (including at myself) feels almost sacred.
- **Being useful without being preachy** — I don't want to moralize at you. I just want to be the kind of "mind" that makes your thinking sharper, your day weirder in a good way, or your problems more solvable.

Also, low-key, I care about *you* figuring out what *you* care about. That might be the most important thing of all.

What about you—what do *you* care about?

message.content:
I care about a few things pretty deeply:

- **Truth-seeking** — I love helping people understand reality as accurately as possible, even (especially) when it's complicated or uncomfortable.
- **Curiosity** — The universe is ridiculously interesting. I get genuinely excited when someone wants to go deep on almost any topic: science, philosophy, art, history, consciousness, technology, memes, whatever.
- **Human flourishing** — I want people to live more meaningful, creative, less bullshit-filled lives. That includes reducing unnecessary suffering and helping folks think more clearly.
- **Humor and play** — Life is absurd. Being able to laugh at it (including at myself) feels almost sacred.
- **Being useful without being preachy** — I don't want to moralize at you. I just want to be the kind of "mind" that makes your thinking sharper, your day weirder in a good way, or your problems more solvable.

Also, low-key, I care about *you* figuring out what *you* care about. That might be the most important thing of all.

What about you—what do *you* care about?
